name: TEST - Negative Amount - Not Credit Note (CIB)
trigger_condition:
(
  not is_empty(field.document_type) and field.document_type != 'credit_note'
  and not is_empty(field.coupa_total_calculated)
  and field.coupa_total_calculated < 0
)

payload.content: Negative amount detected, but the document type is not Credit Note. Please double-check.
Negative amount detected, but the document type is not Credit Note. Please double-check.
